name: Hermosa Rectangular Acacia Wood Dining Table -Teak Finish - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant Patio Table
description: Enjoy this stylish Christopher Knight Home Hermosa Rectangular Acacia Wood Dining Table, prefect for any patio set up. Featuring a beautiful teak finish, this rectangular table is a wonderful addition. The smooth lines of the legs give the table a calm, stylish look that complements the perpendicular wooden slats featured on the table top. Place your favorite dining chairs around this table creating an outdoor dining spot or you could set this table off to the side of your entertaining area and use it as a serving table. You will appreciate the beauty of this Christopher Knight Home Hermosa Rectangular Acacia Wood Dining Table.
